items.name: glass-surface
items.title: Glass Surface
items.description: Base liquid-glass surface — a thin, restyleable wrapper over @liquidglassjs/react's <LiquidGlass>.

items.name: glass-card
items.title: Glass Card
items.description: A liquid-glass card: glass-surface plus card padding, a hairline border, and a shadow.

items.name: glass-dialog
items.title: Glass Dialog
items.description: A modal dialog: Base UI's Dialog (focus trap, scroll lock, dismissal, ARIA) with a frosted liquid-glass panel and an animated backdrop.

items.name: glass-tabs
items.title: Glass Tabs
items.description: A segmented tabs control: Base UI's Tabs (roving focus, keyboard nav, ARIA) with a glass pill that slides under the active tab.

items.name: glass-switch
items.title: Glass Switch
items.description: A toggle switch: Base UI's Switch (a11y, keyboard) with a real glass thumb — press it and the track refracts through the glass (a live SVG feDisplacementMap lens, so it works in every browser).

items.name: glass-slider
items.title: Glass Slider
items.description: A slider: Base UI's Slider (drag, keyboard, ARIA) with a real glass thumb — drag it and the rail refracts through the glass (a live SVG feDisplacementMap lens, so it works in every browser).

items.name: glass-dropdown-menu
items.title: Glass Dropdown Menu
items.description: A dropdown menu: Base UI's Menu (anchored positioning, roving focus, typeahead, ARIA) with a frosted glass popup panel.
